mapper.select: SELECT SYSLOG_RULE_ID, SYSLOG_RULE_NM, SYSLOG_CONTENT, NODE_TYPE, PRIORITY_ORDER , ALARM_SEVERITY, OCCUR_STR1, OCCUR_STR2, OCCUR_STR3, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR1 , OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR2, OCCUR_EXCEPT_STR3, USE_YN FROM GATHER.TB_SYSLOG_RULE_MST WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT NODE_NUM, NODE_ID, NODE_NM, MODEL_NUM, MODEL_ID , IP_ADDR, MAC_ADDR, ADMIN_YN, PRIMARY_GB, SNMP_VER , SNMP_COMMUNITY, SNMP_PORT, LATITUDE, LONGITUDE, NETCONF_PORT , NETCONF_ID, NETCONF_PW, NETCONF_TYPE, NODE_DIVISION, VENDOR , SFLOW_IP, UP_DATETIME, CHNG_DATETIME, REG_DATETIME, DATA_SOURCE FROM RESOURCE.TB_NODE_MST WHERE NODE_NM = #{nodeNm}
